calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-10-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.
Petitioners QunShen Yu and Huan Zhen Huang; father and mother of minor.
Petitioners Huang Zhen Huang sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Xie Xue Hong.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Zhencong Yu to Koby Zhencong Yu.
The court also grants the petition for Change of Name of Petitioner Huang Zhen Huang to Sandra HuanZhen Huang.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
